name: Darren Jacobs
description: Darren Jacobs is a UK-based business leader and digital specialist. He is currently the Head of Sales (EMEA) at Zitcha, a retail media platform, where he focuses on retail media and commerce media insights

name: Andre Barrett
description: Andre is an experienced entrepreneur, investor and digital product specialist, and the founder of Barrett Ventures, a portfolio of businesses acquired through strategic M&A. With over 12 years running a digital agency, he has led the development and launch of web and mobile products for major brands including Sky, Sainsbury’s and JPMorgan Chase. Combining deep expertise in digital marketing with a strong background in finance — including CFA studies and a CQF qualification — Andre now focuses on acquiring and scaling profitable SMEs, driving growth through digital transformation, operational efficiency and strategic leadership.

name: Ian Parkinson
description: Ian Parkinson has led Parkinson Signs for over 30 years, continuing a proud family legacy that spans more than 80 years across three generations. Under Ian’s leadership, the company has strengthened its reputation as a reliable, high-quality B2B sign manufacturer, serving well-known national brands such as Thwaites Brewery and O2 across multiple sites and venues. With a focus on operational excellence, craftsmanship and long-term client relationships, Ian has built a highly experienced team — many of whom have been with the business for decades.
